ab: na makuda kinaqadavan tucu a qadaw?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: na vucelelj a pagalju a kinaqadavan nu paka liyaw a temekel ta maculjuculju a zaljum.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.

ab: na makuda kinaqadavan tucu a qadaw?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: maculju a pagalju a kinaqadavan nu paka liyaw a temekel ta zaljum.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.

ab: na makuda kinaqadavan i casaw?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: maqadaw aravac a qadaw, paqenetju ta kiljaljaung.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.

ab: na makuda kinaqadavan i casaw?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: liyaw a qerepus, neka nu qadaw i kalevelevan.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.

ab: nutiyaw namakuda a kadjunangan?
en: How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: inika maqadaw nu tiyaw, liyaw a qerepus, qaca vali.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: na makuda kinaqadavan ta zua qadaw?
en: How was the weather that day?

ab: tucu a qadaw, na vucelelj nu macasaw kavau a paka liyaw ta kava.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.

ab: na namakuda kinaqadavan nu kalja pulavayan?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: sarunguaq aravac a kinaqadavan nu kalja pulavayan.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: uri qemudjlj nu tazua qadaw?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: tazua bulay a kinaqadavan inika uri qemudjalj.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: uri qemudjlj nu tazua qadaw?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: ui, tazua inika uri qemudjalj.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.

ab: tucu qemudjaqugjalj anga?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: meljay anga, minqut anga qadaw.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.

ab: tucu? qemudjaqudjalj anga
en: Is it raining now?

ab: qemudjalj anga, ini aken a na kemacu ta ljinay.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.

ab: qudjalj anga i casaw?
en: Is it raining outside?

ab: inika qemudjaqugjalj tucu nu pasuvililj tu cengelj, uri qemudjalj kacu anga ta ljinay nu macasaw.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: nu icavilj uri ljaljeqel nu kaljaljeqelan?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: ui, nu icavilj uri vucelelj nu kaljaljeqelan kavau anga paka liyaw.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: tucu a cavilj uri maculju nu kaljaculjuan?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: ui, maculju aravac nu kaljaculjuan, tekelu anga paka liyaw ta zaljum.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: tjengelay sun ta kaljavuvuan?
en: Do you like spring?

ab: tjengelay aken ta kaljavuvuan, sarunguaq aravac a kinaqadavan.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.

ab: tjengelay sun ta kaljauragan?
en: Do you like autumn?

ab: inika ken a tjengelay ta kaljauragan liyaw aravac a buhu nu kaljauragan.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
